_note: draft & revise MUST stay on Opus — they emit the full dossier schema, which only compiles on Opus's structured-output grammar (Sonnet times out; see dossier.schema.json $comment). critique/chat/gather/metrics run on Sonnet to cut cost. Models that lack adaptive thinking + effort (Haiku, claude-3*) are handled gracefully by engine/src/llm.ts but cannot run the gather web-search tools.
